ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the measurement was taken */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the measurement was taken */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the measurement was taken */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the measurement was taken */,
  "pm2_5" REAL /* PM2.5 measurement */,
  "pm10" REAL /* PM10 measurement */,
  "so2" REAL /* SO2 measurement */,
  "no2" REAL /* NO2 measurement */,
  "co" REAL /* CO measurement */,
  "o3" REAL /* O3 measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature measurement */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure measurement */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point measurement */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall measurement */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the measurement was taken */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "data_collection_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category the measurement belongs to */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_data_collection_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_frequency") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Agency responsible for the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of station */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Additional information about the station's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes_description" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., Hourly, Daily) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "frequency_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the frequency (e.g., hour, day, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
